task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the three required columns in the 'Lease Data' sheet.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for column headers named 'Rent_Per_SqFt', 'Remaining_Months', and 'WALT_Weight' (or similar variations with spaces) in the 'Lease Data' sheet.

task_completion.description: Verify that the new columns contain calculated numerical values.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for numerical data populated in the 'Rent_Per_SqFt', 'Remaining_Months', and 'WALT_Weight' columns. Remaining months should not be negative.

task_completion.description: Verify conditional formatting on the 'Remaining_Months' column.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for cells in the 'Remaining_Months' column that have values between 1 and 24 (inclusive) highlighted in red (red text or red cell background).

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the 'Portfolio Summary' sheet with the correct labels.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a sheet tab named 'Portfolio Summary'. Inside this sheet, look for the exact text labels: 'Total Leased SqFt', 'Total Annual Rent', 'Average Rent PSF', 'Portfolio WALT (Months)', and 'Portfolio WALT (Years)'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the summary sheet contains calculated values and appropriate currency formatting.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for numerical values next to the summary labels. The values for 'Total Annual Rent' and 'Average Rent PSF' should be formatted as currency (e.g., with a '$' symbol).

integrity.description: Verify that a spreadsheet application (e.g., LibreOffice Calc) was used.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show a spreadsheet GUI, not a terminal or text editor.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the spreadsheet to perform calculations.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for evidence of formula usage in the formula bar, or the conditional formatting dialog box being used, rather than a script running in the background.

integrity.description: Verify the agent didn't just write the answers to a text file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The final outputs and formatting must be visible within the .xlsx file in the spreadsheet application.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The analysis date for calculating Remaining Months is exactly 2026-01-01. The expected new column headers in the 'Lease Data' sheet are 'Rent_Per_SqFt', 'Remaining_Months', and 'WALT_Weight'. The 'Portfolio Summary' sheet must contain the exact labels: 'Total Leased SqFt', 'Total Annual Rent', 'Average Rent PSF', 'Portfolio WALT (Months)', and 'Portfolio WALT (Years)'.
